title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's victory impacts their tournament standing and chances for further advancement, boosting team morale and fan engagement.

title: Virginia Secures ACC Tournament Win Against NC State
summary: Virginia defeats NC State 81- in the ACC Tournament, continuing their winning streak against the Wolfpack.
charlotte_impact: The win solidifies Virginia's position in the tournament and affects their future matchups and potential for championship contention.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarterfinals
summary: Virginia plays NC State in the quarterfinal round of the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game determines which team advances further in the ACC Tournament, impacting their season and national ranking.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Odds and Predictions
summary: Preview of the NC State Wolfpack versus No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers ACC Tournament quarterfinal game.
charlotte_impact: Provides insights for sports fans and bettors, influencing viewership and engagement with the tournament.

title: Charlotte Area Forecast: Near-Summer Temperatures Expected
summary: High temperatures approaching record highs are expected this weekend in the Charlotte area.
charlotte_impact: Impacts outdoor activities and energy consumption, requiring residents to prepare for warmer conditions.

title: Chesterfield County Man Charged After Shooting at Deputy
summary: Jonathan Ross McCaskill faces charges after allegedly firing at a deputy in Patrick, South Carolina, leading to a standoff.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers faced by law enforcement and the potential for violence in the community.

title: Shooting Near Walmart in University City, Suspect Arrested
summary: A shooting occurred outside a Walmart on North Tryon Street; one person was injured, and a suspect is in custody.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety in commercial areas and the effectiveness of security measures.

title: Man Killed in Salisbury Shooting, Suspect Arrested
summary: Namyous Dejhmariek’Kali Jackson, 25, is charged with murder in connection with a fatal shooting in Salisbury.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the ongoing issue of gun violence in the region and its devastating consequences.

title: Queens Royals Make NCAA Tournament Debut
summary: Queens University of Charlotte celebrates its men's basketball team's first appearance in the NCAA Tournament.
charlotte_impact: Brings pride and recognition to the university and the city, inspiring students and the community.

title: Monroe, NC Native Inspires as NASA Hidden Figure
summary: Dr. Christine Darden's legacy as one of NASA's human computers inspires women in STEM during Women's History Month.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the contributions of women in STEM and encourages future generations to pursue careers in science and technology.

title: Gaston County Farmers Markets to Accept SNAP Benefits
summary: Farmers markets in Gastonia, Mount Holly, and Belmont will accept SNAP benefits starting in April.
charlotte_impact: Increases access to fresh, local produce for low-income residents, promoting healthier eating habits.

title: I-77 Toll Lanes: Free During Major Crashes?
summary: Clarification on whether I-77 toll lanes become free during major crashes; tolls may be lifted near crash sites, but not universally.
charlotte_impact: Addresses public confusion regarding toll lane policies during emergencies, improving driver awareness.

title: Charlotte City Council Seeks Federal Funding for Law Enforcement
summary: Charlotte City Council seeks $10M+ in federal funding for law enforcement upgrades, including vehicles and equipment.
charlotte_impact: Could enhance law enforcement capabilities and improve public safety if the funding is secured.

title: Historic Salisbury Building Transformed into Senior Housing
summary: A historic building in downtown Salisbury is transformed into an affordable senior housing community.
charlotte_impact: Provides much-needed affordable housing for seniors, revitalizing a historic building and supporting the community.

title: Authorities Seek Identification of Skeletal Remains in Lancaster County
summary: Authorities release a composite image to identify skeletal remains found in Lancaster County in 2024.
charlotte_impact: Aims to bring closure to a missing person case and provide answers to the family of the deceased.
